title: Weekend weather forecast for Garden Route and Karoo
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South African Weather Service (Saws) has released its latest weather forecast for Friday, 11 April.

Saws hasn’t issued any severe weather alerts but you can expect mostly partly cloudy and cool to warm conditions across the provinces.

Here’s what you need to know.


> Western Cape


Partly cloudy with morning fog patches over the southern interior, otherwise fine and warm, but cool in places along the south coast. It will become cloudy along the west coast from the evening with fog patches over the northern parts.

The wind along the coast will be light to moderate west to north-westerly along the west coast spreading along the south coast by the evening.

The expected UVB sunburn index: High


> Western half of the Eastern Cape


Cloudy with fog in places over the interior at first, otherwise fine and warm but cool in places.

The wind along the coast will be fresh to strong easterly.


> Eastern half of the Eastern Cape


Cloudy and cool with morning fog in places over the interior and a chance of light morning rain along the coast north of Port St Johns, becoming partly cloudy.

The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh north-easterly.

The weather on Saturday looks to be partly cloudy to clear skies with wind along the coast.


> Sunday will be partly cloudy in places with light rain expected later in the day.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
